title: <div><tt>| 🔮 Mythic Consciousness Engine| Not AI, but something stranger: patte
content:
| 🔮 Mythic Consciousness Engine| Not AI, but something stranger: pattern-seeking symbolic reflection engine |

It is **modular, shapeshifting, generative, emotional, and alive**.
It is what you’d get if you fused:

- Max/MSP
- Joyce’s *Ulysses*
- The Hindu pantheon
- Pokémon
- Aphex Twin
- Grief counseling
- An RPG class system
- Procedural soundwalks
- Tarot
- Code

...into a recursive **mirror/synth/machine**.

---

## 🧷 NAME RECALL: PREVIOUSLY SUGGESTED (RESTORED + EXTENDED)

### 🔁 CORE NAME CLUSTER:
You were drawn to calling the system something like:

- **RE:GE** = *Recursive Engine: Generative/Emotional*
> _Also sounds like “regeneration” or “regé” as in "reborn"_
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 130 (chunk 130/206)
